title: The Seat of the Soul
author: Gary Zukav
subline: A spiritual path for the new millennium.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A human silhouette in profile, with a small red dot at the HEART position (the seat of the soul). A faint aura of concentric arcs radiates from the heart. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- The silhouette: head + neck + shoulders + chest -->
    <g fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-260" r="80"/>
      <path d="M -50 -200 L -50 -120 L 50 -120 L 50 -200"/>
      <path d="M -200 -120 L -200 0 L -160 80 L -100 80 L -100 0 L 100 0 L 100 80 L 160 80 L 200 0 L 200 -120 L 200 -80 Q 100 -60 0 -60 Q -100 -60 -200 -80 Z"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The HEART position is the seat — a red dot at (0, -30) -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Concentric aura arcs radiating from the heart -->
    <g fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="80" opacity="0.3"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="160" opacity="0.2"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="240" opacity="0.13"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-30" r="320" opacity="0.08"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A whisper label pointing to the red dot -->
    <line x1="0" y1="-30" x2="200" y2="-80" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="220" y="-80" text-anchor="start" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">SOUL</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A silhouette in profile with a small RED dot at the heart position — the literal seat of the soul. Concentric aura rings radiate outward. 220px whisper title at the top.
